RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0028 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Carlos Rossi Date of Birth: 02/12/1976 SSN (tokenized): TKN-813533 Annual Income: $46,000 Employer: Globex Loan Amount: $30,000 Term (months): 48 Branch: Austin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN44976AL Kia Civic 2023 ICE Used 44,000 VIN33332AL Tesla Sportage 2021 Hybrid New 29,000 Authorized Signature: Carlos Rossi
